name: Sewer system
hints: The sewer system has a flood door, a dark hole, and a grate welded over it.
The grate is welded shut - you can't just open it. You need heat to cut through.
Use the match to heat and cut through the welded grate, or find another way through.
The dark hole behind the grate leads deeper. The flood door connects back to the manhole. CUT GRAT with a tool to get through.
notes: Sewer system with a welded grate over a dark hole. Need to cut through the grate. The flood door and dark hole lead to different areas.
